Home.title: Kōrero ki tō mātou tīma
Home.intro: Whakamōhiotia mātou mōu, ā, ka whakapā atu mātou — ahakoa kei hea koe.
Home.benefit1: He whakautu i roto i te rā pakihi kotahi
Home.benefit2: E wātea ana puta noa i ngā mākete me ngā reo 10
Home.benefit3: Ka whakamunatia ō taipitopito, kāore e hokona
Home.formIntro: Ko ngā āpure kua tohua ki te whetū (*) e hiahiatia ana.
Home.secured: Kua whakahaumarutia ō raraunga ki te whakamuna

LeadForm.marketingReferral: I pēhea koe i rongo mai ai mō mātou?
LeadForm.notes: He aha atu hei mōhio mā mātou?
LeadForm.acceptTerms: E whakaae ana ahau ki ngā ture me ngā tikanga
LeadForm.successTitle: Ngā mihi — kua riro i a mātou ō taipitopito
LeadForm.successBody: Ka whakapā atu tō mātou tīma ākuanei.
LeadForm.errorGeneric: I raru tētahi mea. Tēnā, ngana anō.
